ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "pull_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game data was pulled */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the game was played */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "club" INTEGER /* Club the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the player's performance */,
  "motm" TEXT /* Whether the player was man of the match */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the player */,
  "shot_percent" REAL /* Percentage of shots that were on target */,
  "assist" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "passes_made" INTEGER /* Number of passes made by the player */,
  "pass_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of passes attempted by the player */,
  "pass_percent" REAL /* Percentage of successful passes */,
  "tackles_made" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made by the player */,
  "tackle_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of tackles attempted by the player */,
  "tackle_percent" REAL /* Percentage of successful tackles */,
  "red_card" TEXT /* Whether the player received a red card */,
  "gk_saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves made by the goalkeeper */,
  "penalty_saves" INTEGER /* Number of penalties saved by the goalkeeper */,
  "penalty_misses" INTEGER /* Number of penalties missed by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "player_position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player position */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the position belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the position belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lineups" (
  "lineup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lineup */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the lineup belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the lineup belongs to */,
  "formation" TEXT /* Formation used by the team in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lineup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lineups_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lineups_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_lineups" (
  "player_lineup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player lineup */,
  "lineup_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lineup the player belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the lineup belongs to */,
  "player_position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player position in the lineup */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_lineup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_lineups_player_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_position_id") REFERENCES player_positions ("player_position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_lineups_lineup_id FOREIGN KEY ("lineup_id") REFERENCES lineups ("lineup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_lineups_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)
